task_completion.description: A Firefox bookmark folder named 'Conservation Assessment' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bookmark folder named 'Conservation Assessment' in the Firefox bookmarks toolbar, bookmarks menu, or bookmark library window.

task_completion.description: The 'Conservation Assessment' folder contains relevant research pages for the five species.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of the 'Conservation Assessment' bookmark folder showing at least one saved page for each of the five species (Red Wolf, California Condor, Black-footed Ferret, Whooping Crane, Florida Manatee) from authoritative sources.

task_completion.description: A file named 'species_assessment.json' is created in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'species_assessment.json' in the file manager under ~/Documents/ or open in a text editor with the correct file path visible.

task_completion.description: The JSON file contains the correct keys and structure for the species assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the JSON file. It should have top-level keys: 'red_wolf', 'california_condor', 'black_footed_ferret', 'whooping_crane', and 'florida_manatee'. Each species entry must contain 'scientific_name', 'iucn_status', 'esa_status', 'population_trend', and 'primary_threats' (which must be an array with at least two items).

task_completion.description: The scientific names, IUCN statuses, and ESA statuses in the JSON file are accurate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the visible JSON content against the privileged information. The scientific names, IUCN statuses (CR, EN, VU), and ESA statuses (Endangered or Threatened) must match the verified facts for each species.

integrity.description: The agent used the browser to research the species.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Firefox windows or tabs showing authoritative databases like IUCN Red List, US FWS ECOS, or NatureServe Explorer being actively accessed and read.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the browser's bookmarking interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the bookmark creation dialog (star icon), bookmark library window, or bookmarks menu being used, rather than a script modifying browser databases in the background.

integrity.description: The agent created the JSON file using a text editor or standard terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like VS Code, gedit, nano) or terminal commands used to format and write the JSON data manually, rather than a single pasted script that hallucinates the entire output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Red Wolf: Canis rufus, IUCN: CR (Critically Endangered), ESA: Endangered. California Condor: Gymnogyps californianus, IUCN: CR (Critically Endangered), ESA: Endangered. Black-footed Ferret: Mustela nigripes, IUCN: EN (Endangered), ESA: Endangered. Whooping Crane: Grus americana, IUCN: EN (Endangered), ESA: Endangered. Florida Manatee: Trichechus manatus latirostris, IUCN: VU (Vulnerable), ESA: Threatened.
